name: Abdominal aortic aneurysm
treatments: lifestyle changes (quit smoking, healthy diet, regular exercise, weight loss, reduce alcohol)
medications to lower blood pressure and cholesterol
elective surgery for large or rapidly growing aneurysm

name: Acanthosis nigricans
symptoms: patches in skin folds (armpits, neck, groin)

name: Acne
treatments: wash affected area twice daily with mild soap and lukewarm water
avoid oil‑based make‑up and skincare products
apply fragrance‑free water‑based emollient if skin is dry
regular exercise and shower promptly after sweating
wash hair regularly and keep it away from face

name: Acoustic neuroma (vestibular schwannoma)
symptoms: facial numbness, pain or weakness (one side)

name: Acromegaly
symptoms: abnormal height growth in children and teenagers (gigantism)
body growth – feet, fingers, head, tongue and neck increase in size
treatments: injections or tablets to reduce growth hormone levels

name: Actinic keratoses (solar keratoses)
symptoms: colour from skin‑tone to pink, red or brown
occurs on sun‑exposed areas (face, hands, arms, ears, scalp, legs)

name: Actinomycosis
symptoms: Lumps in your cheek or neck
pus leaking from the skin on your chest
a lump or swelling in your tummy
pus leaking from the skin on your tummy
Pain low down in your tummy
a lump or swelling in your lower tummy
treatments: oral antibiotic tablets for several months
surgery to drain abscesses and remove infected skin

name: Acute cholecystitis
symptoms: sudden sharp pain in upper right abdomen
tender abdomen, worsened by deep breathing

name: Acute kidney injury (AKI)
treatments: antibiotics or other medicines to treat infection, raise blood pressure, reduce swelling or modulate immune response

name: Acute myeloid leukaemia
symptoms: unusual and frequent bruising or bleeding
treatments: bone marrow or stem cell transplant

name: ADHD in adults
symptoms: difficulty following instructions or completing tasks
treatments: lifestyle modifications (exercise, sleep hygiene, balanced diet)

name: ADHD in children and young people
symptoms: getting up when expected to sit still

name: Albinism
symptoms: very pale skin that burns easily
treatments: low‑vision aids (large‑print materials, magnifiers, telescopic lenses, screen magnification software)
sunglasses, tinted glasses and wide‑brimmed hats for photophobia
surgery for nystagmus or eye muscle correction
glasses, eye exercises, surgery or injections for squint
regular skin checks for skin cancer

name: Alcohol-related liver disease
symptoms: vomiting blood or blood in stools
treatments: support and advice from alcohol addiction services

name: Allergic rhinitis
treatments: salt water nasal spray or rinse

name: Allergies
symptoms: pain or tenderness around cheeks, eyes or forehead
raised rash (hives) or itchy or red skin
swollen eyes, lips, mouth or throat
treatments: steroid nasal sprays, tablets and creams
adrenaline auto‑injectors (e.g., EpiPen) for severe reactions

name: Alzheimer's disease
symptoms: problems moving around without assistance or performing self-care tasks

name: Amyloidosis
treatments: stem cell or bone marrow transplant

name: Anabolic steroid misuse
symptoms: excess growth of facial and body hair
treatments: referral to a specially trained drugs counsellor
gradually reducing the dose of anabolic steroids

name: Anal fissure
symptoms: bright red blood in the toilet or on the toilet paper after pooing
treatments: pain relief medicines like Buscopan or mebeverine
small cut in the muscle in the anus

name: Anal fistula
symptoms: smelly discharge from near the anus
passing pus or blood when pooing
swelling and redness around the anus

name: Androgen insensitivity syndrome
symptoms: lack of pubic and underarm hair

name: Angelman syndrome
symptoms: walking with arms in the air

name: Angioedema
symptoms: swelling of face, lips, tongue, eyelids
skin, tongue or lips turning blue, grey or pale
treatments: identifying and avoiding the underlying cause

name: Animal and human bites
treatments: blood tests for hepatitis B, C and HIV

name: Ankylosing spondylitis
symptoms: pain and swelling in other parts of the body

name: Antiphospholipid syndrome (APS)
symptoms: throbbing pain and swelling in 1 leg
pain and swelling in arm or tummy
chest pain and coughing up blood

name: Appendicitis
symptoms: pain in the middle of the abdomen
pain in the lower right side of the abdomen

name: Ataxia
treatments: medication for muscle, bladder, heart and eye problems

name: Athlete's foot
symptoms: sore and flaky patches on feet

name: Auditory processing disorder (APD)
symptoms: difficulty with strong accents or fast talkers
treatments: wireless earpiece to reduce background noise

name: Autism
symptoms: Restricted and repetitive patterns of behaviour

name: Autosomal recessive polycystic kidney disease
symptoms: problems with blood flow through the liver

name: Bacterial vaginosis
symptoms: unusual vaginal discharge with strong fishy smell
change to colour and consistency of discharge, such as greyish-white and thin and watery

name: Baker's cyst
symptoms: soft lump at the back of the knee
tightness, stiffness or aching in your knee
treatments: draining fluid out of the cyst
surgery to repair damage to your knee joint

name: Bartholin's cyst
symptoms: soft lump on 1 side near the opening of the vagina
discomfort or pain in the area surrounding the vagina
1 side of the vaginal lips looking larger or swollen
feeling unwell, or having a high temperature
treatments: sitting in a bath with warm water
applying a warm cloth or cotton wool to the cyst
taking ibuprofen or paracetamol for pain
surgical procedure to drain the cyst

name: Bedbugs
symptoms: small brown spots on bedding or furniture
treatments: washing and drying bedding and clothing on hot settings

name: Behçet's disease
symptoms: red, painful eyes and blurred vision

name: Bile duct cancer (cholangiocarcinoma)
symptoms: yellowing of the skin and eyes

name: Birthmarks
symptoms: Flat, light or dark brown patches

name: Bladder pain syndrome (BPS)
symptoms: bladder pain or pain in lower tummy or back
feeling like you need to pee, even when bladder is empty
peeing often, usually small amounts, during the day
waking up at night to pee
leaking out a small amount of pee
treatments: everyday painkillers like paracetamol and ibuprofen
painkillers to treat nerve pain like amitriptyline, gabapentin, or pregabalin
medicines that make you pee less like oxybutynin
pentosan polysulfate sodium to protect bladder from irritation
physiotherapy to strengthen pelvic floor muscles

name: Blepharitis
symptoms: flakes or crusts around the roots of the eyelashes
eyelids sticking together in the morning

name: Bone cyst
treatments: cutting or scraping out the cyst

name: Botulism
symptoms: limp or floppy head, neck, arms or legs
treatments: medicine to stop symptoms getting worse

name: Bowel polyps
treatments: surgery to remove part of bowel

name: Costochondritis
symptoms: pain in front or side of chest

name: Bowel incontinence
symptoms: feeling like you need to poo but cannot get to the toilet in time
not being able to get fully clean after going to the toilet
seeing streaks or stains of poo in underwear
treatments: surgery to repair or replace anal sphincter

name: Brain abscess
treatments: draining the pus through a hole in the skull

name: Brain aneurysm
symptoms: pain above or around the eye
numbness or weakness on one side of the face
weakness or numbness in one arm or down one side of the body
blurred vision or loss of sight

name: Breast abscess
symptoms: breast feels warm or looks red
treatments: draining pus with a small cut in the skin

name: Breast cancer in men
symptoms: change in the size or shape of the breast
change in the shape of the nipple

name: Breast cancer in women
symptoms: change in breast size or shape

name: Breath-holding in babies and children
symptoms: cry and then be silent while holding breath
open mouth as if going to cry but make no sound
be floppy or stiff, or body may jerk
treatments: iron supplements if iron levels are low

name: Broken ankle
symptoms: large amount of swelling or bruising
hurts to put weight on it
feels very stiff or is difficult to move

name: Broken collarbone
symptoms: bone sticking out of the skin

name: Broken hip
symptoms: pain in the hip or upper leg
swelling and bruising around your hip and upper leg
not being able to stand or put weight on the affected hip and leg
difficulty moving your hip and leg
the affected leg is at an odd angle or is shorter than the unaffected leg
treatments: surgery to fix the broken bones back into place using screws, nails, rods or plates

name: Broken leg
treatments: surgery with plates, rods or screws
traction to pull bone back into place

name: Broken nose
treatments: hold an ice pack on your nose
stitches or strips for large wounds

name: Broken or bruised ribs
symptoms: swelling or tenderness around affected ribs
treatments: use painkillers like paracetamol or ibuprofen
apply ice pack to affected area
rest and take time off work
breathe normally and cough when needed
hold a pillow against chest when coughing

name: Bronchiectasis
symptoms: cough that does not go away

name: Bronchitis
treatments: antibiotics if caused by bacterial infection
